title: The Island’s Bubble Appears
description: On pages 1–4, this part follows Narrator, Unknown person #1, Luffy, Fish-Men, Zoro, Sanji, Chopper. The core story beat is the island’s bubble appears.
scene: The scene centers on the island’s bubble appears, with Narrator, Unknown person #1, Luffy, Fish-Men, Zoro, Sanji, Chopper driving the moment.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The Undersea volcanoes are going to eruup?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: It's time we turned back, men!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Luffy!!! Tell the kraken to get as far away from here as possible!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Hold it!! There's no need for that!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: It's already dashing as fast as its tentacles will carry it!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: So much for being a formidable beast of legend!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Good to hear!! I might get on with this kraken after all!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Don't make fun of it!! That's just how scary these undersea eruptions are!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Still, these eruptions I've gotta see!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: EVacuate to the front of the ship!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Oh, as though that's going to make any difference!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Aaaaaa a a a a a ghhhhhh!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: There's magma flowing across the ocean flood ooooo...!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: The ghost ship and the umibouzu...!!!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: The temperature difference is twisting the current into a whirlpool!!

dialogue.speaker: Fish-Men
dialogue.text: Nami- San, which direction is fishman island -

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Even now he's having unhealthy thoughts?!

summary: The Island’s Bubble Appears. This part advances the crew from their post-timeskip reunion into the undersea route and the first conflicts surrounding Fish-Man Island.
